title: Linx ANT-868-CW-QW Whip

test_results.notes: Tested without a ground plane. This whip needs one, so it reads poorly across the US 902-928 MHz band, resonating down near 892 MHz instead.
Tested on a ground plane. With one, the match improves dramatically, dropping to about 1.76:1 at 915 MHz and resonating up in the 928 MHz range.

description: 868 MHz straight quarter-wave whip from TE Connectivity / Linx (ANT-868-CW-QW), RP-SMA male. It relies on a ground plane: without one it reads around 7:1 in the US 902-928 MHz band, but on a ground plane it tunes up into the band and matches near 1.76:1 at 915 MHz.
commentary: Just not a good antenna for 915. You could maybe get away with it up at ~925 but there are better options out there.
